SourceProxy.name: SHYXBooleanOperationFilter
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Boolean (CGAL, relaxed)

Documentation.short_help: CGAL union / intersection / difference without requiring closed meshes.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Wraps CGAL Polygon_mesh_processing corefinement booleans like the VESPA boolean filter, but does not abort when meshes are open: it logs a warning and still calls CGAL. By default CGAL is not asked to throw on self-intersection (unlike the strict VESPA filter). For badly conditioned data the operation may still return failure or an empty / unexpected surface; use advanced options to match VESPA-style strictness or to skip volume-orientation preprocessing.

InputProperty.name: Source
InputProperty.label: Tool mesh
InputProperty.Documentation: Second surface (same role as VESPA boolean "Source").

IntVectorProperty.name: ThrowOnSelfIntersection
IntVectorProperty.label: Throw on self-intersection
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, CGAL uses the same strict self-intersection policy as vtkCGALBooleanOperation.

IntVectorProperty.name: OrientToBoundVolumeWhenNeeded
IntVectorProperty.label: Orient if volume unclear
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, CGAL may re-orient a mesh that does not bound a volume before the boolean (same optional step as the VESPA filter). Turn off to skip this preprocessing.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If on, point/cell data from the primary input are probed onto the result (vtkCGALPolyDataAlgorithm).
